Party B’s Address for Transfers will be notified to Party A by authenticated SWIFT message. If not by authenticated SWIFT message, such notice shall be given in writing on its letterhead signed by an authorised person or in any other adequate and secured manner as it could be further agreed between the parties.

finalReturns.additionalLanguage: When no amounts are or may become payable by the Transferor with respect to any obligations (except for any potential liability under Section 2(d)) under this Agreement, the Transferee will transfer to the Transferor Equivalent Credit Support (VM) with respect to the Credit Support Balance.
